system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Muscle
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You plant your feet in the ground and assume a low horse-riding stance, building your internal energy to protect you against attacks. On a Success, you absorb 1 Wound from up to 1 Attack per Rank of Neigong for one round. This only works against mundane Attacks, not Kung Fu Techniques. You cannot take any Moves while using this ability, but you can attack. Cathartic: This absorbs 1 Wound from up to 1 Attack per Rank of Neigong for one round per Rank of Neigong. This works on both mundane Attacks and Kung Fu Techniques equal to or less than your Qi level.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This absorbs 1 Wound from up to 1 Attack per Rank of Neigong for one round per Rank of Neigong. This works on both mundane Attacks and Kung Fu Techniques equal to or less than your Qi level.
